discovery.notes: SINGLE-PAGE mode (--single / --cap 1). No sitemap fetch or BFS performed — only the homepage was in scope. Final URL redirected from https://www.hirslanden.ch/ to https://www.hirslanden.ch/de/corporate/home.html (default German locale). fetchTechnique 'headed-chrome' (headless: false, channel: 'chrome') chosen up-front per the run brief's bot-management guidance for a Swiss commercial origin; the first navigation succeeded (HTTP 200) so no escalation was needed.

consent.notes: OneTrust banner present. Reject-all handler was not clickable within the timeout on this load; accept-all (#onetrust-accept-btn-handler) dismissed the visible banner. The OneTrust Preference Center (div#onetrust-pc-sdk / #ot-pc-lst) remained in the DOM as a hidden region after dismissal and its headings/CTAs/paragraphs leaked into the raw capture; they were filtered out of pages/home.json, _brand-extraction.json palette, and the CTA/heading aggregations. Side-effect caveat per playwright-recipe.md applies (accept-all may have activated analytics/marketing scripts).

runs.scrollPass: 4 viewport steps @300ms + bottom + return to top
